title: Elbaf Reveals Its Giants
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Dorry, Colon, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A grand return!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's the great EIRIK!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: The giant warrior pirates are back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's great! They were taking a while!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey! Captains!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You comin' to the bar for a drink?!

dialogue.speaker: Colon
dialogue.text: Colon

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NOPE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How Cooome!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Awww!! They're heading up straight away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that so? Well, if they've got guests, that's probably for the best. Once they start drinking, they could be here for three days straight!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're heading up to the sun realm...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: _Take this basket with you! Ripley's favourites are in there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I packed some for your father, too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wow! Thanks!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, y'know that pirate that Dorry n' Brogy went to fetch?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He just became one of the four emperors!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The boss told me about him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...Remember that name!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Okay, I'm off!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, kid!! Let the captains know I'll be by later with drinking snacks for the Banquet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Got it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Look!! The great EIRIK!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Talk about a good fortune!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We're just in time for a rainbow.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let's catch a ride!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A Rainbow!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's a gorgeous one too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if it's raining on the other side...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the first time I've been so close to a rainbow!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's so clear!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you supposed to be able to see rainbows from this angle?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Its mystique and Beauty would be evident from any angle!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's really nothing out of the ordinary. You can draw them with a sun stone painter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Draw?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you saying that someone made that rainbow?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WELL OF GOURSE!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
